data: Rectangular marble plaque, broken in 2 fragments, lower right corner broken.
Fine-grained, homogeneous, white marble, likely Lunense, Docimian, Göktepe, Hymettan. Digital microscopy: homeoblastic to heteroblastic fabric (identification based on pXRF, digital microscopy)
Text on 7 straight lines, with 2 staurograms at the beginning and at the end of the first line. Rubricated letters; interpuncts only in the last line.
Small omicron and omega; K with short branches.
Second half C5 AD - first half C6 AD (staurogram)
San Diego cemetery (catacombs of Vigna Cassia)
Photo 2017 courtesy Museo Archeologico Regionale Paolo Orsi (Aut. Assessorato Beni Culturali Regione Siciliana n.10681 del 06/05/2014)

An outstanding collection of archaeological material. The collection ranges from Siracusa and the surrounding territory (Megara Hyblaia, Akrai, Kasmenai etc) to encompass all of eastern Sicily, reaching as far as Gela and Agrigento. The ground floor covers prehistory through to the end of the Classical period. Upstairs includes Hellenistic and Roman Syracuse and a display of material from the catacombs. A gallery displaying material from Hellenistic eastern Sicily is in preparation.
Aggiunte e correzioni alle epigrafi paleocristiane di Siracusa
S.L. Agnello, «Aggiunte e correzioni alle epigrafi paleocristiane di Siracusa», Nuovo Didaskaleion 6 (1956): 52–68
Silloge di iscrizioni paleocristiane della Sicilia
S.L. Agnello, Silloge di iscrizioni paleocristiane della Sicilia (Rome, 1953)
Manipulus epigraphicus christianus memoriae aeternae I.B. de Rossi dicatus. Contributi alla Siracusa sotterranea

Paolo Orsi, «Manipulus epigraphicus christianus memoriae aeternae I.B. de Rossi dicatus. Contributi alla Siracusa sotterranea», Atti della Pontificia Accademia Romana di Archeologia. Memorie 1, fasc. 1 (1923): 113–22

1𐆠 Ἐνθάδε κῖτε Ἀριάγνη 𐆠
2μόνανδρος τελευτᾷ
3ἐτῶν ἑβδομήκοντα πέντε´. Ὁ δὲ
4Θεὸς κὲ ὁ Χριστὸς αὐτο̣ῦ [κὲ] [τὸ]
5Ἅγιον Πνεῦμα ἀνα̣[ψύξαιεν?]
6αὐτῆς τὸ ψυχάρι<ο>ν. [Ἐκοιμήθη?]
7π͡ρ(ὸ) ιε´ interpunct καλ(ανδῶν) interpunct Ὀ[κ]τωβ[ρίων]

Text encoding: Dmitry Dundua, Robert Crellin
Ἐνθάδε κῖτε Ἀριάγνη μόνανδρος τελευτᾷ ἐτῶν ἑβδομήκονταπέντε Ὁ δὲ Θεὸς καὶ ὁ Χριστὸς αὐτοῦ κὲ τὸ Ἅγιον Πνεῦμα ἀναψύξαιεν αὐτῆς τὸ ψυχάριον Ἐκοιμήθη πρὸ ιε καλανδῶν Ὀκτωβρίων
